title: 04879_Active_Statistical_Inference
positive_examples: Provides a method for valid and more powerful statistical inference compared to current baselines.
negative_examples: If applied poorly, could lead to less powerful inferences and worse downstream decisions than classical inference.
Model’s estimate of uncertainty could be miscalibrated, leading to incorrect conclusions.
Relies on the assumption that data points are i.i.d., which may be violated in sequential data collection.
